nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Amazon Linux 2023 Docker image that installs CPU-only PyTorch and the wingspan package, then runs the cloud training entrypoint (`wingspan.cloud`) as an unprivileged user. Designed for CPU-only self-play training with artifacts shipped to S3.
nodes.languageNotes: Installs CPU-only torch via a dedicated index URL before the project install to avoid pulling the multi-GB CUDA wheel; runs under a fixed UID non-root user (flyway) for security.

nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build-context filter that restricts the image build to only `pyproject.toml`, `README.md`, and `src/`, explicitly excluding VCS metadata, virtual environments, checkpoints, tests, docs, and large artifact files to keep the image lean.
